Issue.Title: Add score display
Issue.Description: Add a score counter that displays in the top-left corner of the game. The score should increment by 10 points each time the snake eats food.

Issue.Title: Add restart hint below the game
Issue.Description: Show a small helper line below the canvas that says 'Press R to restart'. Keep gameplay unchanged.

Issue.Title: Show a game over message
Issue.Description: When the snake dies, display a centered 'Game Over' message on the canvas. Keep the existing controls and gameplay behavior unchanged.

Issue.Title: Add pause and resume controls
Issue.Description: When the player presses P, pause the snake game and freeze movement. While paused, render a centered 'Paused' message on the canvas. Press P again to resume. Keep the existing controls, score display, restart hint, and game-over behavior unchanged.
